args.query:
SELECT TRIM(o.OwnerId) AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS SalesAmount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
WHERE date(o.EffectiveDate) >= '2022-06-25' AND date(o.EffectiveDate) <= '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY TRIM(o.OwnerId)
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT TRIM(o.OwnerId) AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS SalesAmount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId
WHERE date(o.EffectiveDate) >= '2022-06-25' AND date(o.EffectiveDate) <= '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY TRIM(o.OwnerId)
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;
